title: Hermes orchestrates Telegram agent communication
summary: Hermes owns runtime Telegram conversation orchestration while the Anchor backend provides stable APIs and retains ownership of state, permissions, and memory.
notes: Filename convention (docs/adr/, 0002- prefix) and single-decision content firmly indicate ADR. No explicit Status: Accepted marker present, so locked set to false per locked-only-when-Accepted rule; if synthesizer treats numbered ADRs as accepted by default, locked may warrant promotion.
